	<div class="entry-content uk-container uk-container-small" _uk-paralla_x="y:-10,0;opacity: 1,1;easing: -2">
		<section class="section1 uk-margin-xlarge-bottom">
<div class="wrap_title_en">
<h1>採用情報</h1>
<p  class="title_en" >Recruitment information</p>
</div>
<div class="uk-margin-large-top uk-margin-large-bottom">
<div uk-lightbox="animation: slide" class="my_gallery  cw_mygallery_list  uk-flex uk-grid-small" id="my_gallery_48_"  data-mq="4:3" data-mqs="4:3"  uk-grid><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no1 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9102-1024x684.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9102-1024x684.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no2 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9095_-1024x684.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9095_-1024x684.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no3 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9085-1024x683.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9085-1024x683.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no4 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9058-1024x683.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9058-1024x683.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div></div>
</div>
<div class="uk-container-xsmall uk-padding uk-padding-large@s">
<p class="style1 fs-22"><span>仲間と楽しく仕事ができるコミュニケーション能力と、</span><span>新しい技術を自ら学ぶことができる積極性</span></p>
</div>
<div class="uk-container-640">
<p>「道路」は一人の力では作り上げることができません。多くのスタッフとのコミュニケーションが取れ、この日進月歩の時代の中で、新しい「モノゴト」を積極的に学ぶことのできる人材を募集しています。</p>
</div>


<div class="uk-margin-large-top uk-margin-large-bottom">
<div uk-lightbox="animation: slide" class="my_gallery  cw_mygallery_list  uk-flex uk-grid-small" id="my_gallery_48_"  data-mq="4:3" data-mqs="4:3"  uk-grid><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no1 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9161-1024x683.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9161-1024x683.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no2 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9154-1024x683.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_9154-1024x683.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no3 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_1172-1024x683.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_1172-1024x683.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div><div class="col  uk-width-1-2 uk-width-1-4@s no4 "><a  href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_1364-683x1024.jpg" data-set="48_" data-caption="" ><figure  class="asp uk-position-relative" ><div class="asp *** asp-4-3@s asp-4-3" data-src="https://seibudouro.co.jp/wp_seibu/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/IMG_1364-683x1024.jpg" style="background-size:cover;" uk-img></div></figure></a></div></div>
</div>
</section>
<hr class="uk-margin-xlarge-bottom">

<section id="jv" class="section2 child-section uk-margin-xlarge-bottom">
<div class="wrap_title_en">
<h1>募集一覧</h1>
<p  class="title_en" >Job Vacancies</p>
</div>
<p>新卒、中途採用どちらも大歓迎です。<br />詳細はハローワーク求人票もしくは直接お問い合わせください。</p>
<div>
<div><span><div class=" job_list uk-flex uk-grid-large uk-margin-large-top" uk-grid><div class="uk-width-1-1 uk-width-1-2@s job_type new-graduate"><h2 class="job_type_title">新卒採用</h2><div class="job_type_list" ><ul class="uk-list"><li class="uk-position-relative"><a class="" href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/apre/apre-833/"><div ><p>現場施工管理者、建設重機オペレーター、建設機械整備工</p><p class="text3">令和８年３月末　高等学校卒業予定者（※3職種共通）</p><div class="uk-position-center-right"><span uk-icon="icon:chevron-right; ratio: 1.5" ></span></div></div></a></li></ul></div></div><div class="uk-width-1-1 uk-width-1-2@s job_type hiring"><h2 class="job_type_title">中途採用</h2><div class="job_type_list" ><ul class="uk-list"><li class="uk-position-relative"><a class="" href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/apre/apre-831/"><div ><p>現場施工管理者</p><div class="uk-position-center-right"><span uk-icon="icon:chevron-right; ratio: 1.5" ></span></div></div></a></li><li class="uk-position-relative"><a class="" href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/apre/apre-829/"><div ><p>建設重機オペレーター</p><div class="uk-position-center-right"><span uk-icon="icon:chevron-right; ratio: 1.5" ></span></div></div></a></li><li class="uk-position-relative"><a class="" href="https://seibudouro.co.jp/apre/apre-1560/"><div ><p>建設機械整備工</p><div class="uk-position-center-right"><span uk-icon="icon:chevron-right; ratio: 1.5" ></span></div></div></a></li></ul></div></div></div></span></div>
</div>
</section>
